(2) Subject to paragraph (3), the following forms, if used to request that the proceedings listed in column B are issued, will be returned unissued if received by the court on or after 22nd April 2014 –


(3) Subject to paragraph (4), the court may in cases of urgency direct that a form specified in paragraph 4.6(1) or 4.6(2) is to be issued as if the request to issue had been made on the form applicable on or after 22nd April 2014, and if it does so, may make any supplementary directions as it considers appropriate.


(4) Paragraph (3) does not apply if a form specified in paragraph 4.6(1) or 4.62(3) is issued after a period of six months beginning with the 22nd April 2014 has elapsed.
